title: EQ - X button, close the screen
scenario: EQ screen X close button returns to Device Settings screen on tap
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Tap on a connected device to open the Device Settings screen.
4. Tap on Equalizer to open the EQ screen.
5. Observe the upper right corner of the EQ screen for an X (close) button.
expected: The EQ screen closes and the user is returned to the Device Settings screen.
